speaker: SOMERSET
text: It is too late; I cannot send them now.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: This expedition was by York and Talbot

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Too rashly plotted. All our general force

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Might with a sally of the very town

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Be buckled with. The overdaring Talbot

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Hath sullied all his gloss of former honor

speaker: SOMERSET
text: By this unheedful, desperate, wild adventure.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: York set him on to fight and die in shame

speaker: SOMERSET
text: That, Talbot dead, great York might bear the name.

speaker: CAPTAIN
text: Here is Sir William Lucy, who with me

speaker: CAPTAIN
text: Set from our o’er-matched forces forth for aid.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: How now, Sir William, whither were you sent?

speaker: LUCY
text: Whither, my lord? From bought and sold Lord Talbot,

speaker: LUCY
text: Who, ringed about with bold adversity,

speaker: LUCY
text: Cries out for noble York and Somerset

speaker: LUCY
text: To beat assailing Death from his weak regions;

speaker: LUCY
text: And whiles the honorable captain there

speaker: LUCY
text: Drops bloody sweat from his war-wearied limbs

speaker: LUCY
text: And, in advantage ling’ring, looks for rescue,

speaker: LUCY
text: You, his false hopes, the trust of England’s honor,

speaker: LUCY
text: Keep off aloof with worthless emulation.

speaker: LUCY
text: Let not your private discord keep away

speaker: LUCY
text: The levied succors that should lend him aid,

speaker: LUCY
text: While he, renownèd noble gentleman,

speaker: LUCY
text: Yield up his life unto a world of odds.

speaker: LUCY
text: Orleance the Bastard, Charles, Burgundy,

speaker: LUCY
text: Alanson, Reignier compass him about,

speaker: LUCY
text: And Talbot perisheth by your default.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: York set him on; York should have sent him aid.

speaker: LUCY
text: And York as fast upon your Grace exclaims,

speaker: LUCY
text: Swearing that you withhold his levied host

speaker: LUCY
text: Collected for this expedition.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: York lies. He might have sent and had the horse.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: I owe him little duty and less love,

speaker: SOMERSET
text: And take foul scorn to fawn on him by sending.

speaker: LUCY
text: The fraud of England, not the force of France,

speaker: LUCY
text: Hath now entrapped the noble-minded Talbot.

speaker: LUCY
text: Never to England shall he bear his life,

speaker: LUCY
text: But dies betrayed to fortune by your strife.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Come, go. I will dispatch the horsemen straight.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Within six hours they will be at his aid.

speaker: LUCY
text: Too late comes rescue; he is ta’en or slain,

speaker: LUCY
text: For fly he could not if he would have fled;

speaker: LUCY
text: And fly would Talbot never, though he might.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: If he be dead, brave Talbot, then adieu.

speaker: LUCY
text: His fame lives in the world, his shame in you.
